title: Fix Telegram login widget window.onTelegramAuth issue
description: Fix the error 'Uncaught ReferenceError: onTelegramAuth is not defined' on the frontend login and register pages. Ensure `window.onTelegramAuth` is defined and accessible to the Telegram widget script loaded dynamically. Use appropriate Nuxt 3 practices to inject the script or register the global callback.
acceptance_criteria: window.onTelegramAuth is defined before the Telegram widget script runs
Telegram login and registration flows work without ReferenceError
No multiple popup blocked warnings from the Telegram widget
Linting passes (npm run lint in frontend)
